'''âzh-n-th''' ('''kazhanath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbegrip|umbegrip]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbegrip|umbegrip]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-n-th
|-
! Lemma
| kazhanath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhanath|thizhanath]] || [[word:jizhanath|jizhanath]] || [[word:shizhanath|shizhanath]] || [[word:kizhanath|kizhanath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhanath|thuthuzhanath]] || [[word:jujuzhanath|jujuzhanath]] || [[word:shushuzhanath|shushuzhanath]] || [[word:kukuzhanath|kukuzhanath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhanath|thuzhanath]] || [[word:juzhanath|juzhanath]] || [[word:shuzhanath|shuzhanath]] || [[word:kuzhanath|kuzhanath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhanath|thuzhanath]] || [[word:juzhanath|juzhanath]] || [[word:shuzhanath|shuzhanath]] || [[word:kuzhanath|kuzhanath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhanath|thezhanath]] || [[word:jezhanath|jezhanath]] || [[word:shezhanath|shezhanath]] || [[word:kezhanath|kezhanath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhanath|thothozhanath]] || [[word:jojozhanath|jojozhanath]] || [[word:shoshozhanath|shoshozhanath]] || [[word:kokozhanath|kokozhanath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhanath|thozhanath]] || [[word:jozhanath|jozhanath]] || [[word:shozhanath|shozhanath]] || [[word:kozhanath|kozhanath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhanath|thozhanath]] || [[word:jozhanath|jozhanath]] || [[word:shozhanath|shozhanath]] || [[word:kozhanath|kozhanath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhanath|thĂŠzhanath]] || [[word:jĂŠzhanath|jĂŠzhanath]] || [[word:shĂŠzhanath|shĂŠzhanath]] || [[word:kĂŠzhanath|kĂŠzhanath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhanath|thathazhanath]] || [[word:jajazhanath|jajazhanath]] || [[word:shashazhanath|shashazhanath]] || [[word:kakazhanath|kakazhanath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhanath|thazhanath]] || [[word:jazhanath|jazhanath]] || [[word:shazhanath|shazhanath]] || [[word:kazhanath|kazhanath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhanath|thazhanath]] || [[word:jazhanath|jazhanath]] || [[word:shazhanath|shazhanath]] || [[word:kazhanath|kazhanath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhanath|shazhanath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhanath|goshazhanath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhanath|gokishazhanath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhanathnĂŒ|shazhanathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanathnknĂŒ|goshazhanathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanathnĂŒ|gokishazhanathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhanathshĂ«|shazhanathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkshĂ«|goshazhanathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhanathshĂ«|gokishazhanathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanathro|shazhanathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkro|goshazhanathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanathro|gokishazhanathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanathmu|shazhanathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkmu|goshazhanathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanathmu|gokishazhanathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhanathsher|shazhanathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhanathnksher|goshazhanathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhanathsher|gokishazhanathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhanathng|shazhanathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkng|goshazhanathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhanathng|gokishazhanathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhanathya|shazhanathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkya|goshazhanathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhanathya|gokishazhanathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhanathyam|shazhanathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkyam|goshazhanathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhanathyam|gokishazhanathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhanathnĂŒshĂ«|shazhanathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhanathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhanathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhanathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhanathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanathnĂŒro|shazhanathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanathnknĂŒro|goshazhanathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanathnĂŒro|gokishazhanathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanathnĂŒmu|shazhanathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanathnknĂŒmu|goshazhanathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanathnĂŒmu|gokishazhanathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhanathshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhanathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhanathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhanathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanathshĂ«ro|shazhanathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkshĂ«ro|goshazhanathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanathshĂ«ro|gokishazhanathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanathshĂ«mu|shazhanathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkshĂ«mu|goshazhanathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanathshĂ«mu|gokishazhanathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhanathronĂŒ|shazhanathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkronĂŒ|goshazhanathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanathronĂŒ|gokishazhanathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhanathroshĂ«|shazhanathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkroshĂ«|goshazhanathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhanathroshĂ«|gokishazhanathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanathromu|shazhanathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkromu|goshazhanathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanathromu|gokishazhanathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhanathmunĂŒ|shazhanathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkmunĂŒ|goshazhanathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanathmunĂŒ|gokishazhanathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhanathmushĂ«|shazhanathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkmushĂ«|goshazhanathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhanathmushĂ«|gokishazhanathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanathmuro|shazhanathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanathnkmuro|goshazhanathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanathmuro|gokishazhanathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
